earthworks.title: Earthworks & Site Prep
earthworks.description: Bulk earthmoving, excavation, site clearance, and soil compaction services for major infrastructure projects.

images.alt: A large cleared, graded, and leveled dirt field prepared for construction
images.title: Bulk Site Clearance

images.alt: Workers spreading lime/cement stabiliser across a prepared subgrade, a soil stabilisation technique used before surfacing, with a TLB/tractor in the background
images.title: Subgrade Soil Stabilisation

images.alt: Heavy roller compacting the prepared soil subgrade to meet engineering compaction codes
images.title: Subgrade Soil Compaction

images.alt: A large cleared and graded site with compaction machinery in the distance preparing the ground
images.title: Clearing & Grubbing

images.alt: Orange excavator digging a deep trench or channel for bulk earthworks preparation
images.title: Bulk Excavation

images.alt: Excavated foundation trenches with concrete footing preparations on a construction site
images.title: Foundation Excavation

images.alt: Bricklaying crew constructing masonry walls within foundation trenches during substructure phase.
images.title: Substructure Brickwork & Masonry Construction

images.alt: Surveyor positioning tripod instrument alongside masonry structure for setting-out verification.
images.title: Setting-Out Verification at Masonry Structure

images.alt: Technician drilling wall penetration for services installation during building fit-out phase.
images.title: Wall Penetration for Services Installation

images.alt: Worker inspecting rebar placement within foundation trench during structural phase.
images.title: Foundation Rebar Inspection

images.alt: Surveying level instrument set up adjacent to structure under construction for datum reference.
images.title: Datum Reference & Level Instrument Setup

images.alt: Site supervisor inspecting steel reinforcement grid prior to concrete slab pour.
images.title: Rebar Grid Inspection Before Slab Pour

images.alt: PPE-equipped worker operating a theodolite to establish level and alignment on site.
images.title: On-Site Levelling & Alignment Check

images.alt: Concrete strip footing laid along a foundation trench during early civil works.
images.title: Foundation Trench & Strip Footing

images.alt: Surveyor operating a total station on open ground during initial site establishment.
images.title: Initial Site Survey & Instrument Setup

civil.title: Civil Works & Infrastructure
civil.description: Stormwater drainage networks, sewer reticulation, culverts, and concrete foundations.

images.alt: Completed multi-barrel concrete culvert bridge structure set into an embankment on a rural road
images.title: Culvert Bridge Construction

images.alt: Large diameter concrete pipe laid inside a deep excavated trench for bulk stormwater infrastructure
images.title: Bulk Pipe Installation

images.title: Manhole & Junction Box Construction

images.alt: Site worker in PPE supervising precast box culvert units being positioned on a prepared road base
images.title: Precast Box Culvert Installation

images.alt: Worker in PPE hand-laying bricks to construct a stormwater catch pit within a timber-shuttered excavation

images.alt: Dense steel rebar mesh and timber formwork prepared inside a deep excavation for a concrete retaining wall
images.title: Retaining Wall Construction

images.alt: Placing concrete cover slabs on a stormwater drainage channel
images.title: Stormwater Channel & Cover Slabs

images.alt: Brickwork and steel reinforcement for an underground stormwater chamber
images.title: Underground Junction Chamber

images.alt: Workers installing large diameter concrete pipes in a deep trench
images.title: Bulk Concrete Pipeline Installation

images.alt: Worker finishing a brick-lined stormwater catch pit junction
images.title: Stormwater Catch Pit Completion

images.alt: Completed multi-cell precast concrete culvert bridge over a stream bed
images.title: Stormwater Culvert Bridge

images.alt: Preparation for concrete structure steel reinforcement, and formwork
images.title: Concrete Structure Preparation

images.title: Large Diameter Pipe Installation
